productDisplayName: Spinn Men Track Runner White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Track Runner shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details Synthetic upper with mesh inlays and central lace-ups has heavy mesh padding on the inner Foamy rubber midsole upraised at the heel TPU outsole with a decoupled heel and an arched midfoot has deep flex grooves and patterned grooves all over Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
